title: President Biden Will Put US Back on Obama’s Climate Trajectory
summary: John P. Holdren, science advisor to the Obama administration, lists 6 things he thinks Joe Biden would do on climate change.
body: John P. Holdren, science advisor to the Obama administration, lists 6 things he thinks Joe Biden would do on climate change.
